_doc: Render config template. Copy to cad/<subsystem>/ and fill in your subsystem data.

subsystem._doc: Subsystem identification. part_prefix matches your BOM numbering (e.g. GIS-EE).
subsystem.name: <subsystem_id>

reference_resolution._doc: Coordinate reference resolution for labels. Defaults to 1920x1080 if omitted.

materials._doc: Map logical material names to PBR presets (15 built-in) or custom overrides. Keys are free-form IDs referenced by your Blender scripts.

camera._doc: Define N camera views. Keys (V1, V2, ...) are free-form; annotate_render.py matches filenames against these keys. You are not limited to V1-V5.

explode._doc: Explosion configuration. type: radial | axial | custom. rules map part groups to explosion directions.

prompt_vars._doc: Variables for AI enhancement prompt templates. product_name and material_descriptions are used by templates/prompt_*.txt.

material_descriptions.visual_cue: <what it looks like in the Blender render>

components._doc: Component name registry. Source: design doc section X.8 BOM. Used by annotate_render.py for label text.

labels._doc: Per-view label coordinates at reference_resolution. Only list components VISIBLE in each view (occluded = omit). Keys must match camera section keys.
